# dynamodb-toolkit-lambda

> AWS Lambda adapter for `dynamodb-toolkit` v3. Serves the toolkit's standard REST route pack as a Lambda handler for API Gateway (REST / HTTP), Lambda Function URLs, and ALB.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit-lambda dynamodb-toolkit
```

## API

```ts
export function createLambdaAdapter<TItem>(
  adapter: Adapter<TItem>,
  options?: LambdaAdapterOptions<TItem>
): (event: LambdaEvent, context: Context) => Promise<LambdaResult>;
```

Auto-detects the payload format (API Gateway v1 / v2 / Function URL / ALB) from the incoming event and returns the matching result envelope. Single factory, single handler.

### Options

- `policy` — partial overrides for the rest-core policy.
- `sortableIndices` — `{field: gsiName}` map for `?sort=field`.
- `keyFromPath` — `(rawKey, adapter) => keyObject`. Default uses `adapter.keyFields[0]`.
- `exampleFromContext` — `(query, body, event, context) => example` threaded into `prepareListInput`. Receives both the Lambda event and context; v2 cookies are flattened into `event.headers.cookie` before this runs.
- `maxBodyBytes` — tenant-level body cap (default 1 MiB). Enforced post-decode for base64 bodies.
- `mountPath` — strip this prefix before dispatch. Same semantics as the Fetch adapter.

## Quick start

```js
import {Adapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';
import {createLambdaAdapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-lambda';

const adapter = new Adapter({client, table: 'planets', keyFields: ['name']});
export const handler = createLambdaAdapter(adapter, {mountPath: '/planets'});
```

## Local debugging

Ships a zero-dep bridge so the exact Lambda handler drives real HTTP requests on localhost.

```js
import http from 'node:http';
import {createNodeListener} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-lambda/local.js';
http.createServer(createNodeListener(handler)).listen(3000);
```

Also exports `createFetchBridge(handler)` for Bun.serve / Deno.serve / Cloudflare Workers.

## Links

- Parent toolkit: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit
- Sibling (Fetch): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-fetch
- Sibling (Koa): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-koa
- Sibling (Express): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-express
- Route pack reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki/HTTP-handler
- Lambda adapter wiki: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-lambda/wiki
